spec.name: The Muddy Sewer
spec.description: You are standing in mud to your knees. This is not the kind of place for a picnic. The muddy sewer stretches further into the south.

south.description: You see the muddy sewer continuing into the darkness to the south.

extra_descs.description: It is as dark as tar and looks like something out of a toilet, on top of that, the smell is absolutely overwhelming.
